main_objective: Add durable activity logging for real task status changes.
repo_summary: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Prisma SQLite local-first workflow app in v1.8 operator UX phase.
acceptance_criteria: Every real allowed task status transition writes one task_status_changed activity event.
No activity event is written when the submitted task status equals the current status.
Existing task_completed and task_archived analytics behavior remains unchanged.
No Prisma schema, dependency, or UI behavior change.

workers_hired.assignment: Inspect roadmap and workflow docs for safest highest-leverage objective.
workers_hired.result: Recommended activity/event log foundation as v1.8 objective.

workers_hired.assignment: Inspect stack, boundaries, risks, and small architecture-safe objective.
workers_hired.result: Recommended task_status_changed logging as the smallest no-schema activity gap.

workers_hired.assignment: Identify verification commands for v1.8 activity-log work.
workers_hired.result: Recommended targeted Vitest, full unit, lint, typecheck, smoke, and e2e checks.

workers_hired.assignment: Inspect server actions and activity logging for smallest backend-safe improvement.
workers_hired.result: Recommended updateTaskStatus activity logging with two focused tests.

commands_run.result: failed before tests: Playwright webServer could not start because prisma db push exited with Schema engine error

tests_or_checks.name: targeted Vitest
tests_or_checks.notes: Activity log and server action tests passed.

tests_or_checks.name: lint
tests_or_checks.notes: ESLint returned 0 errors and 16 warnings outside this change.

tests_or_checks.name: Playwright smoke
tests_or_checks.notes: Web server bootstrap failed at Prisma db push before browser tests started.

decisions: Implement task_status_changed activity logging as the one main objective.
Do not change schema, dependencies, UI, or workflow engine in this run.
Record Prisma db push smoke failure as a blocker instead of altering the test harness.
risks: Smoke/e2e verification remains blocked by Prisma db push schema engine failure.
Activity docs and code naming are not fully reconciled.
blockers: Prisma db push fails with Schema engine error during Playwright smoke webServer startup.
next_tasks: Investigate and fix Prisma db push schema engine failure.
Re-run npm run test:smoke after the Prisma issue is resolved.
Reconcile remaining activity event naming and coverage gaps.
summary: Task status changes now create durable operator-visible activity events for real transitions, with focused tests and full unit/static verification passing. Browser smoke remains blocked by Prisma db push startup failure.
